rows.label: xs08080100_MSG0001
rows.name: They got into the city streets?![ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs08080100_MSG0002
rows.name:
Defense units, intercept immediately!
Deploy reserve forces too![ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs08080100_MSG0003
rows.name: Hey! We're moving to intercept too![ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs08080100_MSG0004
rows.name: But what about guarding that Doll?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs08080100_MSG0005
rows.name:
Wan's team is there, right? We'll protect
the city ourselves if we have to![ST:wait ]
